feed.title: Land Of Festivals — Research Blog
feed.subtitle: Behind-the-scenes notes on Indian festival research: fieldwork, source discoveries, and methodological reflections.
feed.rights: Content available under fair use. Primary source quotations from public domain texts.
feed.generator: Land Of Festivals static site generator

entry.title: Sambat Jalana: The Festival That Predates Holi
entry.summary: In 1896, W. Crooke documented the Dravidian tribes of Mirzapur burning a stake called Sambat Jalana — 'the burning of the old year' — on the same date as Holi. This may represent a pre-Hindu festival layer that predates the Holi we know by centuries.
